use_cases: AI assistant avatars in chat interfaces and dashboards
Decorative loading states with Siri-like animated presence
Voice interface indicators for smart home or IoT applications
Interactive hero elements for AI-powered SaaS landing pages
Branding accents for conversational AI or chatbot products
ai_summary: A CSS-animated orb component inspired by Apple's Siri, featuring @property conic gradients with blur and contrast filters for a luminous, fluid effect. Includes built-in size, color, and speed controls, making it ideal for AI interfaces, virtual assistants, or as a decorative animated element in modern web applications.
